{{Infobox group
| name = Navigator ships
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Navigator ships]] were approaching the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|There is a fleet of [[Navigator ships]] near [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Two [[Navigator ships]] were listing and taking on water.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Navigator ships]] are almost always small and require only a [[Soulbound]] captain and a skeleton crew.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
